task_completion.description: Verify that the satisfaction link for SRS-72 has been repaired to point to NEEDS-27.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the ReqView interface, locate requirement SRS-72. Check its 'Satisfies' or 'Links' column/section to verify it points to NEEDS-27 and does not point to the invalid target NEEDS-999.

task_completion.description: Verify that the satisfaction link for SRS-106 has been repaired to point to NEEDS-17.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the ReqView interface, locate requirement SRS-106. Check its 'Satisfies' or 'Links' column/section to verify it points to NEEDS-17 and does not point to the invalid target NEEDS-998.

task_completion.description: Verify that the satisfaction link for SRS-132 has been repaired to point to NEEDS-24.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the ReqView interface, locate requirement SRS-132. Check its 'Satisfies' or 'Links' column/section to verify it points to NEEDS-24 and does not point to the invalid target NEEDS-997.

task_completion.description: Verify that the satisfaction link for SRS-137 has been repaired to point to NEEDS-21.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the ReqView interface, locate requirement SRS-137. Check its 'Satisfies' or 'Links' column/section to verify it points to NEEDS-21 and does not point to the invalid target NEEDS-996.

task_completion.description: Verify that the project changes have been saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for evidence that the project was saved after making changes, such as clicking the Save button (Ctrl+S) or the absence of an unsaved changes indicator (like an asterisk) in the title bar or document tab.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the ReqView GUI to modify the links.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating the ReqView application, opening link dialogs, or using context menus to add/remove links.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not edit the underlying JSON files directly in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots of text editors (like VS Code, nano, vim) open with the project's JSON files.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal should not show commands like 'sed', 'jq', or python scripts being used to modify the project files directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires repairing satisfaction links in the SRS document of a ReqView project. The correct links are: SRS-72 -> NEEDS-27, SRS-106 -> NEEDS-17, SRS-132 -> NEEDS-24, and SRS-137 -> NEEDS-21. The invalid links that must be removed are NEEDS-999 (from SRS-72), NEEDS-998 (from SRS-106), NEEDS-997 (from SRS-132), and NEEDS-996 (from SRS-137).
